74.question: What is Newton's First Law of Motion?

concepts.name: Newton's First Law of Motion
concepts.description: States that an object at rest stays at rest and an object in motion stays in motion with the same speed and in the same direction unless acted upon by an unbalanced force.

concepts.name: Object at Rest
concepts.description: An object that is not moving.

concepts.name: Object in Motion
concepts.description: An object that is moving.

concepts.name: Force
concepts.description: A push or pull that can change an object's state of motion.

concepts.description: The tendency of an object to resist changes in its state of motion.
